rules.rule_text:
title: Okta MFA Reset or Deactivated
id: 50e068d7-1e6b-4054-87e5-0a592c40c7e0
status: test
description: Detects when an attempt at deactivating  or resetting MFA.
references:
- https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/api/system-log/
- https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/api/event-types/
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
date: 2021-09-21
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.credential-access
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1556.006
logsource:
  product: okta
  service: okta
detection:
  selection:
    eventtype:
    - user.mfa.factor.deactivate
    - user.mfa.factor.reset_all
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- If a MFA reset or deactivated was performed by a system administrator.
level: medium
